title: micranthemum elatinoides
intro: Micranthemum elatinoides, also known as creeping pennywort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is native to North America and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micranthemum elatinoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it has also been used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
